vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="270" width="100" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4fV1bFY1ENiunrKQZZSY-4" value="团队协作" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4fV1bFY1ENiunrKQZZSY-17" value="结对<div>编程</div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontColor=#3399FF;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="215" y="305" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4fV1bFY1ENiunrKQZZSY-18" value="<font style="color: rgb(51, 153, 255);">个人实践</font><br><font style="color: rgb(0, 204, 0);">团队实践<br></font><font style="color: rgb(255, 51, height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
